text:
It was a star-filled night. A gentle white owl hooted softly from the top branch of an ancient oak tree. Near dawn. In its wise eyes glowed knowledge of times forgotten. It blinked.

There, just below moonlight, nestled a nest. Two owlets peered sleepily. One slept. The other fluttered its wings.

Suddenly a hawk swooped down. But the owlets fluttered down gracefully. They didn't fight. They flew away together.

Up they went again. Together. Into the warmth of dawn.

And that was an owl's story.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
